reviews.review_description: This game is really fun! But missing a few things, like a bridal when riding it just would make the game better for me. Also a halter so you can lead your horse around without riding them! Another thing for me is the horse just stands still, it can’t drink or eat and if they could make the horse move its head or or turn around to drink or eat that would be great! Otherwise I love this game and with these new things it really would be the best horse game ever.

reviews.review_title: Nieces will love this horse game
reviews.review_description:
This game is a surprisingly calming, hands-on horse-care experience. At first, I found myself awkwardly stepping around the manure, but once I cleaned it up, I felt this odd, unexpected sense of accomplishment, like checking something off a to-do list. From grooming to dressing up my horse in cute accessories, there’s a relaxing, everyday satisfaction in all the small chores. It’s definitely something I’m excited to show my nieces, especially since they’ll love the whole process of caring for their own horse and taking it out for a gentle ride.

For now, I’m leaning towards a solid four out of five. It’s already a great foundation, but there’s room for it to really shine, like making sure the horse keeps its accessories when you ride and adding more fun, interactive elements around the ranch. If these improvements roll out in future updates, I’d be more than happy to bump up my rating.

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of childhood riding lessons
reviews.review_description:
I would have gone crazy over this kind of game as a kid when I was learning to ride and wished more than anything to have a horse of my own.  Being able to reach over and pet the horse feels so much more satisfying in VR compared to more traditional PC and console games. I haven't seen any other experiences like this for Quest, so finding Horse & Hoof was such a nice surprise!

I really enjoyed hanging out in the barn in a relaxing environment that put me at ease. Chilling in the pasture with horses was always my favorite part of the lessons, so I would love to see more horse animations added that show the playful and mischievous personalities they sometimes have. Seeing the holiday decorations is also nice because it gives me the sense the developer will be adding seasonal updates, and that's a nice reason to come back and check it out regularly.

The turning and slowing down during the riding lesson felt pretty realistic and mimics the same gesture you would use to turn a horse using the reins. More settings for comfort such as adding a turning vignette and snap turn option would help reduce motion sickness for users who are more sensitive to that.

There are several areas for improvement such as increasing the realism of the tack, grooming equipment and other details, but this is expected since the game is still in early stages of development. I think there is a lot of potential for the game developers to build on the current features and include a variety of different riding lessons and trail rides in the future. I look forward to keeping up with updates as it evolves!

This game can make even a non-rider feel like a pro!  From customizing the color of your horse to cleaning its hooves and riding across the horizon, this is a great game for anybody and everybody.  The landscape options and visuals are top tier, transporting you from your living room to the grassy coast and western frontier!  Definitely would recommend this game to anyone who loves horses, and even those who don’t.  Relaxing yet action packed, this game is for everybody!
This game is amazing and It feels as if you have a real horse! Its a great game worth the money. I absolutely love this game, 5 stars for sure!
10/10 I’m hoofed on this game. I can’t wait for the next update!!! I absolutely love riding my horse at the cliffs and the cozy stables!!! I’m so glad there is VR game available about horses

reviews.review_title: Horse and Hoof VR is a must-play!
reviews.review_description:
Horse and Hoof VR is nothing short of a masterpiece for anyone passionate about horses or VR gaming. From the moment you step into its stunningly immersive world, you're greeted with breathtaking graphics that bring every detail of the equestrian lifestyle to life.
The gameplay features are equally impressive. You can ride, train, and care for your horses with an array of realistic mechanics that feel intuitive and deeply satisfying.

The developers have gone above and beyond to ensure an authentic experience for horse enthusiasts. The attention to detail—from the lifelike movements of the horses to the immersive sound design—makes it feel like you're truly part of this vibrant world.
If you're a horse lover or just someone looking for a top-tier VR experience, Horse and Hoof VR is a must-play. Saddle up and see for yourself why this game is a standout gem! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

This is a great simulator for anyone who loves horses or just wants to play a chill, relaxing simulator. The controls are super smooth and easy to learn. It’s great for all ages, definitely recommend!

Horse & Hoof is a wonderfully relaxing and satisfying game where you care for a horse by grooming and cleaning it as well as ride it! If you are artistic, you can customize it with vibrant colors as well (I may have given mine blue hair). The simple tasks like brushing and hoof cleaning, are incredibly enjoyable and reminiscent of PowerWash Simulator in their gratifying, real-time progress. The soothing atmosphere, easy controls, and sense of accomplishment make it a perfect choice for unwinding. If you love low-pressure, calming gameplay, Horse & Hoof is an absolute treat.
